home.title: Your assets, every chain.

home.earnDesc: Add to pools and earn trading fees

bridge.title: Bridge
bridge.routeNote: All transfers route through Stellar for maximum security

states.locking: Locking your {{asset}} so it can be bridged safely — confirm in your wallet.
states.locked: Locked safely ✓  Waiting for the Stellar side (usually about a minute).
states.claimable: Ready to receive — confirm to claim your asset on Stellar
states.refunding: This didn't go through — your funds are being returned. No action needed.

bridge.trustNote: Protected by a smart-contract lock — your funds can't be taken.

swap.highImpactWarning: This trade would move the price more than {{threshold}}% — try a smaller amount or raise your limit.

pools.title: Liquidity Pools
pools.emptyState: No pools yet — be the first to add liquidity
pools.lowLiquidity: Low liquidity — price impact may be high

poolDetail.priceChangeNote: Your position is currently worth {{value}}, which includes about {{change}} from price changes since you deposited.
poolDetail.ilExplainerBody: When prices shift between the two assets in a pool, your share may be worth a bit less than if you'd held them separately. For example, if XLM moves 20% relative to USDC, your position could be worth about {{scenario}} less than just holding.

portfolio.title: Your positions
portfolio.emptyPositions: No pool positions yet — start earning in pools

wallet.connectStellar: Connect your Stellar wallet to continue
wallet.connectChain: Connect your {{chain}} wallet for this action
wallet.whyMultiple: Each chain needs its own wallet connection — like having separate keys for different doors.

practice.title: Get practice funds
practice.desc: Test everything for free before using real assets.
practice.faucetNote: Funds are on the test network and have no real value.

help.title: Help & Trust
help.bridgingExplain: When you bridge, your assets are locked on the source chain by a smart contract. The same value is then made available on Stellar. The lock can only be released by you claiming your Stellar assets — or by an automatic refund if the transfer doesn't complete in time.
help.poolsExplain: Liquidity pools hold two assets. Traders swap against the pool and pay a small fee. That fee goes to people who deposited — you earn a share of every trade in proportion to your deposit.
help.ilExplain: When the prices of two assets in a pool shift, your share may be worth slightly less than if you'd held them separately. This difference is temporary and often smaller than the fees you earn — but it's real and worth knowing about.
help.auditPending: Audit in progress — mainnet will launch only after an independent audit passes. Practice mode is fully safe to use.
help.bridgedAssetsExplain: Assets bridged from other chains arrive on Stellar as tokens issued by a trusted anchor or issuer. These tokens represent a claim on the underlying asset. We disclose each issuer openly — see the contract addresses below.
help.notFinancialAdvice: AVERBRIDGE is a tool, not financial advice. Do your own research before committing real value.

common.yourFundsAreSafe: Your funds are safe — they're locked in the bridge contract and will either complete or be returned automatically.
common.insufficientGas: Not enough {{asset}} for fees — get some from the faucet

errors.highPriceImpact: Price impact is high — your trade would move the market significantly
errors.bridgeFailed: Transfer didn't complete — your funds are being returned automatically
errors.swapFailed: Swap didn't go through — nothing was moved
errors.rpcDegraded: One of our data providers is slow — we're switching to a backup
errors.timeout: This is taking longer than expected — your funds are safe
errors.unknownError: Something unexpected happened. Your funds are safe — check your portfolio or contact support.
